## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Hilti's marketing team and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, from strategy to publishing, with a focus on driving organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Their approach combines AI workflows with human expertise to create high-quality, contextually relevant content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [GrowthX's engagement model includes a strategy sprint followed by a 12-month growth execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [The team showed interest in content generation, SEO optimization, and adapting to AI search trends](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Differentiation

  - [End-to-end partner for content creation, from strategy to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Internal AI platform with workflows leveraged by expert team](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Leadership team includes former executives from TechCrunch, TripAdvisor, and HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Achieved $10M+ revenue and 60+ clients within first year](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Focus on creating content that drives organic growth and adapts to AI search trends](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Engagement Model and Strategy

  - [Two-phase approach: Strategy sprint (4-5 weeks) followed by 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Strategy sprint develops key artifacts to feed AI workflows and begins publishing content](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Deep persona research informs content creation (fears, motivations, pain points)](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Adapting to AI search by creating content that answers specific, contextual queries](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Content Creation Process and AI Integration

  - [AI workflows leverage strategy artifacts for context-rich content generation](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Human experts (editors, SEO specialists) remain in the loop for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Multiple steps in content creation: brief creation, research, writing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating unique, fresh content that goes beyond basic AI-generated text](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### SEO and AI Search Optimization

  - [Focus on being the best answer to persona-specific questions](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Leveraging first-party data and unique insights to differentiate content](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Emphasis on content freshness and regular publishing (daily or multiple times per day)](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Early success in ranking prominently in AI search results (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competition: in-house content teams and traditional SEO agencies](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [GrowthX positions itself as a comprehensive solution that augments internal capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Differentiators: end-to-end service, AI-powered workflows, and focus on rapid, quality content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send presentation deck and additional documentation for team review](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Hilti team to discuss internally and consider next steps (deeper dive or SOW review)](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX) included for more detailed discussions](https://fathom.video/share/yFsvESJFp4uu8ScMz2i8QLrB42wdYFT4?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
